<!-- Every PR must link an approved issue and carry exactly one type:* label. -->

## Linked issue

<!-- Required. Use Closes / Fixes / Resolves so the issue closes on merge. -->

Closes #

## Type

<!-- Check exactly one box and add the matching type:* label to the PR. -->

- [ ] Bug fix (`type:bug`)
- [ ] New feature (`type:feature`)
- [ ] Documentation only (`type:docs`)
- [ ] Refactor (`type:refactor`)
- [ ] Maintenance / tooling (`type:chore`)
- [ ] Breaking change (`type:breaking-change`)

## Summary

-

## Changes

| File | Change |
| ---- | ------ |
|      |        |

## Test plan

- [ ] `pnpm lint`
- [ ] `pnpm typecheck`
- [ ] `pnpm test`
- [ ] `pnpm build`
- [ ] Manually verified the affected flow

## Checklist

- [ ] Linked an approved issue (`status:approved`)
- [ ] Exactly one `type:*` label
- [ ] Conventional commit messages
- [ ] No `Co-Authored-By` trailers
- [ ] Docs updated if behavior changed
